title: elaphoglossum horridulum
intro: Elaphoglossum horridulum, also known as the spiny lip fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as an antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum horridulum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing stress and promoting overall well-being. Elaphoglossum horridulum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
